stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
For an upcoming scheduled commercial flight from Rome to London, the aircraft has a crew of 7 members and 115 passengers. Calculate the Traffic Load using the following information.

Flight crew: 4 male & 3 female
Male passengers: 70
Female passengers: 35
Children: 10
Baggage: 62 items
Standard mass for a flight crew member: 85 kg
Non-revenue load: 500 kg
